Past performance may or may not be sustained in future. Pursuant to IDCWpayment, NAV falls to the extent of payout & statutory levy (if applicable).Face Value- ₹ 10.
Nippon India Focused Fund
Focused Fund
Details as on May 31, 2026
Type of Scheme
An open ended Multi Cap Equity Scheme investing in maximum 30
stocks.
Current Investment Philosophy
This is a multi-cap fund which endeavours to invest in an active and
concentrated portfolio of upto 30 stocks across market capitalisation.

April 28, 2018
